title: My Passport Problem
content: At the airport, Sophia suddenly noticed her passport was missing. Panic immediately filled her mind as she searched every pocket and compartment in her bag. She checked the café where she had stopped earlier and looked around the waiting area carefully. After several stressful minutes, she found the passport inside a travel guide she had packed. Sophia laughed with relief and promised herself to be more organized. The experience was frightening, but fortunately it ended well. Soon afterward, she boarded her flight and continued her journey without further problems.
